title: Retrofit Plan Report
description: Data schema for a phased building decarbonization capital expenditure plan report.

property.description: Physical and baseline attributes of the subject property.

type.description: Asset type (e.g. office, multifamily, retail, industrial, mixed-use).

gfa_sqft.description: Gross floor area in square feet.

year_built.description: Year the building was originally constructed.

baseline_eui.description: Baseline Energy Use Intensity in kBtu/sqft/yr.

summary.description: Top-level financial and carbon summary of the full retrofit program.

total_capex.description: Total capital expenditure across all measures (USD).

total_annual_savings.description: Blended annual energy + operational cost savings once all measures are in place (USD/yr).

simple_payback_years.description: Simple payback period in years (total_capex / total_annual_savings).

npv.description: Net present value of the retrofit program over the hold period (USD).

irr.description: Internal rate of return as a decimal fraction (e.g. 0.18 = 18%).

carbon_reduction_tco2e.description: Total lifecycle carbon reduction vs. baseline over the hold period (tCO₂e).

crrem_stranding_year_before.description: Year asset crosses CRREM stranding threshold without retrofits. Null if already compliant.

crrem_stranding_year_after.description: Year asset crosses CRREM stranding threshold with full retrofit plan implemented. Null if plan keeps asset compliant through hold.

measures.description: Individual carbon reduction measures that make up the retrofit program.

name.description: Short descriptive name of the measure.

capex.description: Installed capital cost (USD), net of incentives unless otherwise noted.

annual_savings_usd.description: Annual energy and operational cost savings (USD/yr).

payback_years.description: Simple payback period for this measure alone (years).

carbon_reduction_tco2e.description: Annual carbon reduction attributable to this measure (tCO₂e/yr).

carbon_abatement_cost_per_tco2e.description: Marginal abatement cost (USD/tCO₂e). Negative values indicate net savings.

implementation_year.description: Calendar year in which this measure is planned for implementation.

incentive_program.description: Name(s) of applicable incentive programs (e.g. IRA §48E, utility rebate).

incentive_value.description: Estimated gross incentive value (USD) for this measure. May be a rebate, tax credit, or grant.

financial_projection.description: Year-by-year financial projection showing cumulative capital deployment and savings.

cumulative_capex.description: Cumulative capital invested through this year (USD).

cumulative_savings.description: Cumulative energy + operational savings realized through this year (USD).

net_cashflow.description: Net cash in/out for this calendar year (savings minus capex deployed in year).

cumulative_net.description: Running cumulative net position (cumulative_savings - cumulative_capex) through this year (USD).

emissions_trajectory.description: Year-by-year emissions intensity trajectory comparing baseline, retrofit scenario, and CRREM pathway.

baseline_kgco2_m2.description: Baseline emissions intensity if no retrofits are undertaken (kgCO₂e/m²/yr).

retrofit_kgco2_m2.description: Projected emissions intensity with retrofit measures in place (kgCO₂e/m²/yr).

pathway_target_kgco2_m2.description: CRREM 1.5°C-aligned decarbonization pathway target for this asset type and year (kgCO₂e/m²/yr).

incentives.description: Summary of all applicable incentive programs referenced in this plan.

program_name.description: Official name of the incentive program.

amount_or_rate.description: Dollar amount, percentage, or rate description (e.g. '30% of installed cost', '$50/unit', '$200K cap').

applicable_measures.description: Names of measures in this plan that qualify.

notes.description: Eligibility conditions, deadlines, stacking rules, or other caveats.

prepared_by.description: Name of the firm or individual preparing this report.

prepared_for.description: Name of the client or recipient of this report.

report_date.description: ISO 8601 date the report was prepared (YYYY-MM-DD).

hold_period_years.description: Investment hold period in years, used for NPV and projection horizon.
